title: Age Calculator
desc: Calculate your exact age in years, months, and days with precision. Get fun statistics like total heartbeats, days lived, and countdowns to your next birthday or half-birthday.

title: Countdown Timer
desc: Countdown Timer - a handy browser-based tool.

title: Date Calculator
desc: Easily calculate the difference between two dates or add and subtract days, weeks, months, and years. Get precise results in days, weeks, months, and years instantly.

title: Random Number Generator
desc: Generate random numbers within any range instantly. Supports unique selection, sorting, and history tracking. Perfect for lotteries, raffles, sampling, and decision making without signup.

title: Budget Tracker
desc: Budget Tracker - a handy browser-based tool.

title: Coin Flipper
desc: Flip a virtual coin for quick decisions with animated results. Track heads and tails statistics, view flip history, and reset counters easily. Perfect for random choices.

title: Date Difference Calculator
desc: Calculate the exact difference between two dates in days, weeks, months, and years. Includes business day counting and date addition features for project planning and age tracking.

title: Meditation Timer
desc: Enhance your mindfulness practice with this customizable meditation timer. Features interval bells, soothing audio cues, and a guided breathing exercise to help you relax and focus.

title: Productivity Score Calculator
desc: Evaluate your daily work efficiency with this comprehensive productivity score calculator. Track task completion, focus time, energy levels, and mood to get actionable insights and personalized tips for improvement.
features: Track task completion and focus time
Visual score breakdown and progress bar

title: Sleep Cycle Calculator
desc: Optimize your rest by calculating ideal bedtime and wake-up times based on 90-minute sleep cycles. Enter your desired wake time or current moment to find the perfect sleep schedule for maximum refreshment.

title: Online Stopwatch
desc: Start a precise online stopwatch with millisecond accuracy and lap tracking. Perfect for sports, cooking, workouts, and presentations. Features keyboard shortcuts and a clean interface.

title: Online To-Do List
desc: Organize your daily tasks efficiently with this free online to-do list. Set priorities, assign due dates, and track progress using local storage without signup.
features: Set task priorities and due dates
Filter by active or completed status

title: Wheel Spinner
desc: Spin a custom wheel to make random choices instantly. Add options, spin the wheel, and get a random winner. Perfect for giveaways, decision making, and games.

title: Age Milestones Calculator
desc: Calculate age milestones. Driving, voting, retirement age. Free milestone calculator.

title: Day of Week Calculator
desc: Find what day of the week any date falls on. Works for past and future dates. Free online day of week calculator.

title: Day of Year Calculator
desc: Calculate what day of the year (1-366) any date falls on. Find remaining days in the year. Free online day of year calculator.

title: Days Between Dates Calculator
desc: Calculate days between two dates. Business days, weeks, months. Free date difference calculator.

title: Daylight Saving Time Converter
desc: Convert times between Daylight Saving Time (DST) and Standard Time. See which countries observe DST and when transitions occur.

title: Hijri Date Converter
desc: Convert Gregorian to Hijri (Islamic) dates. Ramadan, Eid dates. Free Hijri calendar converter.

title: Leap Year Checker
desc: Check if a year is a leap year. Find leap years in any range. Free online leap year calculator with Gregorian calendar rules.

title: Lunar Phase Calculator
desc: Calculate moon phase for any date. Free lunar phase calculator.

title: Time Zone Meeting Planner
desc: Plan meetings across multiple time zones. Find the best time for participants in different cities around the world.

title: Unix Timestamp Converter
desc: Convert Unix timestamps to human-readable dates and back. Supports seconds and milliseconds. Free online Unix timestamp converter.

title: Week Number Calculator
desc: Calculate ISO week number for any date. Free week number calculator.
